creator: yuri@xpert.com
text:
The stereo chip MSP3400C from Hauppauge WinTV-pci frame grabber doesn't 
works, i.e. no sound. This is after changes in /sys/pci/brooktree.c
In 3.0 it worked after I initialized the chip through windows software
and then rebooted to FreeBSD. Now, it doesn't works at all. I have video
out of the board but no sound.
